title: VimFu — gH Select Line Mode
description: gH starts select mode linewise. Select mode is like visual mode but typing replaces the selection, similar to GUI editors.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

setup.content:
# Draft
def greet():
    print("old greeting")
    print("remove me")
    return True

steps.say: G shift H starts select mode line wise. Select mode is like visual mode, but when you type, the selection is replaced immediately. Like a normal text editor.
Go to line three. G shift H. The whole line is selected.
Notice it says select line at the bottom, not visual. In select mode, typing replaces the selection. Press escape.
You can extend the selection with shift arrows or shift J K before typing.
G shift H. Select line mode. The closest Vim gets to how normal editors handle selection. Most vimmers stick with visual mode, but it's there if you want it.
